domain: Mongolian recurve composite bow — bamboo core + horn (compression-strong) belly + sinew (tension-strong) back; opposing-stress laminate.
specific_mechanism: Layered laminate where each layer is optimal for one stress direction; sum is structurally stronger than any single material.
llm_application: LAMINATE-INIT: weight initialization with two distinct distributions per weight position based on estimated gradient-flow direction — heavy-tail (sinew/tension) distribution for weights with predominantly positive gradient flow; bounded (horn/compression) distribution for weights with predominantly negative gradient flow. Direction is estimated from a brief calibration pass.
novelty_claim: Standard weight init (Xavier/He/Kaiming) is direction-agnostic. Layer-wise init (DS-Init, DeepNet) scales by depth. LAMINATE-INIT differs by GRADIENT-FLOW-DIRECTION-INFORMED bipolar init with two distinct distribution families for tension-vs-compression weight roles.
